Nike Air
Max 2025

Redefining Iconic Performance for a New Generation.

Client Nike Global
Year 2025
Role Creative Direction / 3D Motion / Interaction
01 / The Brief

Overview

For the launch of the Air Max 2025, Nike approached us to create a digital ecosystem that moves as fast as the athlete. The goal was to translate the kinetic energy of the new "Air" unit into a motion-first web experience, blurring the lines between product configurator and cinematic storytelling.

Render 01 — Sole Architecture
02 / Context

The
Challenge

The Air Max legacy is immense. The challenge lay in honoring 35 years of heritage while fiercely pushing into a futuristic aesthetic. We needed to visualize "Invisible Air" — the core technology of the 2025 model — without losing the tangible grit of street culture.

Technically, the site needed to handle high-fidelity 3D assets on the fly, ensuring smooth performance across devices ranging from flagship desktops to mid-range mobile phones.

WebGL
React Three Fiber
GLSL
03 / Execution

The Solution

We developed an adaptive interface that evolves with user scrolling behavior. The narrative shifts from a macro "satellite view" of the sneaker technology down to the micro-textures of the fabric.

04 / Results

Performance Metrics

The digital platform has transformed how athletes interact with the Air Max 2025. Users report a greater understanding of the "Invisible Air" technology and a deeper connection to the shoe's kinetic design. The web experience has become an essential digital companion, driving both product engagement and performance improvements.

User Engagement

Increase in average session duration

0%

Feature Adoption

Users interacted with the 3D viewer

0%

Performance Impact

Reduction in WebGL load sequences

0%

Beyond individual metrics, the platform has created a valuable digital ecosystem that informs future product development and marketing methodologies. The success of the immersive experience has established the Nike Air Max 2025 launch as a benchmark in connected e-commerce technology.
